arts.ttl: Bournemouth striker Evanilson has Fleetwood Town to thank for record £40m transfer
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: Bournemouth striker Evanilson has had a difficult start to life in the Premier League following his summer transfer from FC Porto but Gustavo Leal and Jakub Mihalik, who both worked closely with the Brazilian during his time on loan in Slovakia with STK Samorim, have revealed he is used to defying the odds
